name: Cheesy Muffin Melt
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the whole wheat muffins and toast them.
2. Combine the cottage cheese, wheat germ, chiles, oregano, basil, and salt in a bowl, stirring well to blend.
3. Spoon the mixture onto the toasted muffin halves.
4. Top with tomato slices and criss-cross with cheddar strips.
5. Place under the broiler 3 to 4 inches from the heat source.
6. Broil until the cheese melts, about 5 minutes.
Makes 6 open-faced sandwiches.
